Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Do you read a lot of science fiction novels like this, {f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I guess it's good that I invited you today then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I wonder what that exactly means. The core fanbase for the sci-fi genre can get pretty picky...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}It's the ones who answer like you that turn out to be the hardcore fans.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Oh... But even if you aren't familiar with the genre, I think this series hooks people pretty easily.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Apparently, a lot of people get into sci-fi after they read this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}...Sorry. I didn't mean to interrupt while you were reading.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 1 25 25}If you don't mind, can you let me know your thoughts once you finish it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 4 25 25}How far did you get? ...Wow! You've read that much already?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}Huh? I made a lot of progress too. Was I more focused than usual, or...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}[n]have improved thanks to the[n]skillful expression in the writing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Um, if you don't mind... do you think we could read here again sometime?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I used to think reading was only a solo activity.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}But now, I think reading with someone helps me immerse myself deeper into the fictional world.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 5 13 3 1 6}I'm here whenever I can spare the time, so come by if you can. I'd be happy to have you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}All right, that's enough for today. Good night, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}So the other day I recommended the novel I'm reading to a classmate...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}I don't talk to her much, but at the time we were discussing a movie we'd both seen.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}She wasn't too keen on the recommendation and turned me down, though.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}It was because the series looked hard to get into. There are so many volumes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}If she just gave it a chance, I know she would see how interesting it is.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}The basic premise is about journeying to other planets, and even that by itself already sounds intriguing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}And the writing is so unique and poetic. I can't help but get sucked in...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}I know. I'd probably feel the same way.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}It's hard for someone to pick up a series that's been going on for so long.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}Presentation? You mean like, talking in front of a group of people...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Hmm, interesting... So you think I should have slides or something to go with it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}I could probably show them in a room with a projector, or— Wait, that's not what you meant, is it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}...Recommending something to someone is a really tricky thing, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Well, thank you anyways, {f 4 1}-kun. I appreciate you showing interest in that book.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Okay, I think I'll read a little further myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}Whew... I finished the whole thing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}[n]have improved thanks to the[n]skillful expression in the writing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}{f 5 13 3 1 6}Time flies by so quickly. Let me know your thoughts on it next time.[n]{f 1 1}
